tasks.label: Debug Android
tasks.command: adb logcat -c && dotnet build PhotoViewer.Android/PhotoViewer.Android.csproj -c Debug -t:Run -p:AndroidSdkDirectory=%LOCALAPPDATA%\Android\Sdk && adb logcat -s PhotoViewer:V AndroidRuntime:E mono:W monodroid:W

tasks.label: Install Android
tasks.command: adb install -r PhotoViewer.Android\bin\Debug\net10.0-android\cc.xiaojh.PhotoViewer-Signed.apk && adb shell monkey -p cc.xiaojh.PhotoViewer -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1

tasks.label: Debug iOS Simulator
tasks.command: dotnet build PhotoViewer.iOS/PhotoViewer.iOS.csproj -c Debug -r iossimulator-arm64 && xcrun simctl install booted PhotoViewer.iOS/bin/Debug/net10.0-ios/iossimulator-arm64/PhotoViewer.iOS.app/ && xcrun simctl launch booted cc.xiaojh.PhotoViewer

tasks.label: Renew iOS Certificate
tasks.command: find ~/Library/MobileDevice/Provisioning\ Profiles/ -name '*.mobileprovision' -delete && dotnet build PhotoViewer.iOS/PhotoViewer.iOS.csproj -c Release -r ios-arm64 && xcrun devicectl device install app --device "${input:iosDevice}" PhotoViewer.iOS/bin/Release/net10.0-ios/ios-arm64/PhotoViewer.iOS.app && xcrun devicectl device process launch --device "${input:iosDevice}" cc.xiaojh.PhotoViewer

tasks.label: Debug iOS
tasks.command: dotnet build PhotoViewer.iOS/PhotoViewer.iOS.csproj -c Release -r ios-arm64 && xcrun devicectl device install app --device "${input:iosDevice}" PhotoViewer.iOS/bin/Release/net10.0-ios/ios-arm64/PhotoViewer.iOS.app && xcrun devicectl device process launch --device "${input:iosDevice}" cc.xiaojh.PhotoViewer

tasks.label: Install iOS
tasks.command: xcrun devicectl device install app --device "${input:iosDevice}" PhotoViewer.iOS/bin/Release/net10.0-ios/ios-arm64/PhotoViewer.iOS.app && xcrun devicectl device process launch --device "${input:iosDevice}" cc.xiaojh.PhotoViewer

inputs.description: 选择要安装的 iOS 设备
